equipment.name: Acid (vial)
desc: As an action, you can splash the contents of this vial onto a creature within 5 feet or throw the vial up to 20 feet, shattering it on impact. Make a ranged attack against a creature or object, treating the acid as an improvised weapon. On a hit, the target takes 2d6 acid damage.

equipment.name: Alchemist's fire (flask)
desc: This sticky, adhesive fluid ignites when exposed to air. As an action, you can throw this flask up to 20 feet, shattering it on impact. Make a ranged attack against a creature or object. On a hit, the target takes 1d4 fire damage at the start of each of its turns until a creature uses its action to extinguish the flames.

equipment.name: Antitoxin (vial)
desc: A creature that drinks this vial gains advantage on saving throws against poison for 1 hour. It confers no benefit to undead or constructs.

equipment.name: Ball bearings (bag of 1,000)
desc: As an action, you can spill these from the bag to cover a level, square area that is 10 feet on a side. A creature moving across the covered area must succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw or fall prone.

equipment.name: Caltrops (bag of 20)
desc: As an action, you can spread these to cover a 5-foot-square area. A creature that enters the area must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or stop moving and take 1 piercing damage.

equipment.name: Holy water (flask)
desc: As an action, you can splash the contents of this flask onto a creature within 5 feet or throw it up to 20 feet, shattering it on impact. Make a ranged attack, treating it as an improvised weapon. On a hit, a fiend or undead takes 2d6 radiant damage.

equipment.name: Hunting trap
desc: When you use your action to set it, this trap forms a saw-toothed steel ring that snaps shut when a creature steps on a pressure plate in the center. The creature must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or take 1d4 piercing damage and stop moving.

equipment.name: Oil (flask)
desc: Oil usually comes in a clay flask that holds 1 pint. As an action, you can splash the oil in this flask onto a creature within 5 feet or throw it up to 20 feet. On a hit, the target is covered in oil. If the target takes fire damage before the oil dries, it takes an additional 5 fire damage.

equipment.name: Poison, basic (vial)
desc: You can use the poison in this vial to coat one slashing or piercing weapon or up to three pieces of ammunition. Applying the poison takes an action. A creature hit must succeed on a DC 10 Constitution saving throw or take 1d4 poison damage.

equipment.name: Shield
desc: A shield is made from wood or metal and is carried in one hand. Wielding a shield increases your Armor Class by 2. You can benefit from only one shield at a time.

equipment.name: Battleaxe
desc: Versatile (1d10)

equipment.name: Boomerang
desc: If you miss your target, the boomerang returns to your hand.

equipment.name: Harpoon
desc: When you hit a Large or smaller creature with this weapon, you can attempt to impale it.
The target must succeed on a Strength saving throw (DC = 8 + your Strength modifier + your proficiency bonus) or be impaled.
While impaled, the target’s movement is reduced to 0 unless it breaks free, and you can use a bonus action to try to reel it in.
The target can use its action to make a Strength (Athletics) or Dexterity (Acrobatics) check contested by your Strength (Athletics) check to free itself.

equipment.name: Lance
desc: You have disadvantage when you use a lance to attack a target within 5 feet of you.
Also, a lance requires two hands to wield when you aren’t mounted.

equipment.name: Longsword
desc: Versatile (1d10)

equipment.name: Net
desc: A Large or smaller creature hit by a net is restrained until it is freed.
A net has no effect on creatures that are formless, or creatures that are Huge or larger.
A creature can use its action to make a DC 10 Strength check, freeing itself or another creature within its reach on a success.
Dealing 5 slashing damage to the net (AC 10) also frees the creature without harming it; the net is destroyed.
When you use an action, bonus action, or reaction to attack with a net, you can make only one attack regardless of the number of attacks you can normally make.

equipment.name: Quarterstaff
desc: Versatile (1d8)

equipment.name: Spear
desc: Versatile (1d8)

equipment.name: Trident
desc: Versatile (1d8)

equipment.name: Warhammer
desc: Versatile (1d10)

equipment.name: Yklwa
desc: Pronounced: YICK-ul-wah, it consists of a 3-foot wooden shaft with a steel or stone blade up to 18 inches long.
